articles.title: FTX Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Publicly Refuses to Testify in US House Committee – Here’s What Happened
articles.description: Sam Bankman-Fried, former CEO and founder of collapsed crypto exchange FTX, has publicly suggested that he might not appear in the upcoming U.S. House committee’s hearing to testify on the collapse of his crypto empire. In a tweet to the Financial Services Committee Chair Maxine Waters and the committee, Bankman-Fried said he is still not finished with “learning and reviewing what...

articles.title: Billionaire Founder of Coinbase Rejects Sam Bankman-Fried’s Account of Events, Says Funds Were ‘Stolen’
articles.description: Brian Armstrong, the CEO of major crypto exchange Coinbase has said that he believes Sam Bankman-Fried stole customer funds, which ultimately led to FTX's demise early last month. This contrasts sharply with what Bankman-Fried has been arguing in a string of public interviews.... articles.title: Twitter Coin Coming Soon? Leak Emerges; Sayonara Dogecoin And Bitcoin?
articles.description: Rumors are circulating on Twitter in the last few hours that Elon Musk could soon launch his own cryptocurrency, a Twitter Coin.
